content: - [project_overview.md](project_overview.md) — Hotel OTA platform overview, tech stack, current build state

name: Hotel OTA Platform - Project Overview
description: Decentralised hotel-owned OTA with dual coin rewards, ReZ integration, ownership mining. Phase 1 MVP built.
type: project
---

Hotel OTA platform - decentralised hotel-owned Online Travel Agency.

**Why:** Building a hotel booking platform where hotels earn equity over time via performance. Dual coin system (OTA Coin + ReZ Coin). Bangalore launch with 30 hotels.

**How to apply:** All specs are in 6 MD files (01-06) at project root. Follow

- Backend: Node.js + Express + PostgreSQL + Prisma + Redis + BullMQ
- Hotel Panel: Next.js (port 3001)
- Admin Panel: Next.js (port 3002)
- Mobile: React Native (Expo)
- Payments: Razorpay (lazy-init, dev mode returns mocks)

- API: 30+ endpoints, all Phase 1 services, zero TS errors
- Database: 16 Prisma models, seeded with 4 hotels + earn/burn rules + admin user
- PostgreSQL via Postgres.app, Redis via Homebrew
- Admin login: admin@ota.com / admin123
- Hotel staff OTP: check console in dev mode

name: AdBazaar Platform
description: India's first closed-loop ad marketplace. Independent web app integrated with REZ ecosystem. GitHub: git@github.com:imrejaul007/adBazaar.git
type: project
---

AdBazaar is a fully independent Next.js web app — a two-sided marketplace for ALL ad inventory (88+ types: billboards, autos, influencers, restaurant TVs, delivery helmets, WiFi pages, etc.)

**GitHub:** git@github.com:imrejaul007/adBazaar.git

**Tech Stack (per business plan):**
- Frontend: Next.js (R

name: AdBazaar Go-Live Checklist
description: Ops tasks to complete before making AdBazaar live — env vars, storage, and integrations
type: project
---

**Why:** These items are NOT in code — they require manual setup in dashboards and env files. Nothing will break in dev without them, but production will fail.

**How to apply:** Do all of these before flipping AdBazaar to production.

---

### 1. Supabase — Create storage bucket

In Supabase dashboard → Storage → New bucket:
- Name: `listing-images`
- Public: ✅ (buyers and visitors need to see listing images)

---

### 2. AdBazaar env vars (set in Vercel or `.env.production`)

```env

NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=https://xxxx.supabase.co
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=eyJ...
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=eyJ...

RAZORPAY_KEY_ID=rzp_live_xxx
RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET=xxx
NEXT_PUBLIC_RAZORPAY_KEY_ID=rzp_live_xxx
NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY=AIza...

REZ_API_BASE_URL=https://api.rezapp.in
REZ_INTERNAL_KEY=<same as INTERNAL_SERVICE_TOKEN in rezbackend>
ADBAZAAR_WEBHOOK_SECRET=<generate a random 32-char secret — use the SAME value in rezbackend>

NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=https://adbazaar.in
```

---

### 3. REZ Backend — add 2 new env vars

```env
ADBAZAAR_WEBHOOK_URL=https://adbazaar.in
ADBAZAAR_WEBHOOK_SECRET=<same secret as above>
```

These enable the closed-loop attribution: REZ visit/purchase events fire back to AdBazaar.

---

### 4. Google Maps — restrict API key

In Google Cloud Console:
- Restrict to: `Maps JavaScript API`
- HTTP referrer: `https://adbazaar.in/*`
- Never expose the server-side key in `NEXT_PUBLIC_*`

---

### 5. Raz

name: Ads & Marketing Architecture Plan
description: Two-service ad system architecture — rez-ads-service (in-app) and rez-marketing-service (outbound). Future outside-REZ project to be integrated.
type: project
---

REZ ad system is split into two independent services:

**rez-ads-service** (port 4007, standalone git: imrejaul007/rez-ads-service)
- In-app visual ads for any REZ ecosystem app
- Merchant creates → Admin approves → Consumer app serves
- Will need `appId` field added when sister app

name: API Gateway Architecture
description: REZ traffic routes through rez-api-gateway (nginx on Render) — search goes to microservice, rest to monolith
type: project
---

API gateway deployed at https://rez-api-gateway.onrender.com (2026-04-03).

Consumer app EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL now points at the gateway instead of the monolith directly.

**Why:** Strangler Fig migration — gradually move endpoints from monolith to microservices without changing client code.

**How to apply:**
- Search/home

name: REZ Product Strategy Direction
description: REZ must become a "habit layer for local spending" not a feature super-app. Core loop = visit → save → see reward → level up. Key gaps identified March 2026.
type: project
---

REZ strategic direction is to become "the default smart savings and loyalty layer for everyday local spending" — a behavior platform, not a feature app.

**Why:** Business analysis (PDF, March 2026) identified that REZ competes across 8 layers (discovery, cashback, dining,

name: REZ Platform — All Repos & Services
description: Complete inventory of all 18 REZ repos, deploy URLs, microservice extraction status, endpoints, infra, and env vars
type: reference
---

### Core Apps (5) — In Production

| # | Service | Repo | Production URL | Visibility |
|---|---------|------|---------------|------------|
| 1 | **Backend API** | `imrejaul007/rez-backend` | `https://api.rezapp.com/api` | Private |
| 2 | **Consumer App** | `imrejaul007/rez-app-consumer` (nuqta-master) | Expo/EAS mobile build | Private |
| 3 | **Merchant App** | `imrejaul007/rez-app-marchant` | Vercel web + Expo native | Private |
| 4 | **Admin App** | `imrejaul007/rez-app-admin` | Vercel web +

| Monolith File(s) | Extracts To | Repo |
|-------------------|------------|------|
| `notificationService.ts`, `emailService.ts` | Notification Service | `rez-notification-events` |
| `uploadService.ts`, `imageService.ts` | Media Service | `rez-media-events` |
| `analyticsService.ts`, admin dashboard queries | Analytics Service | `analytics-events` |
| `gamificationService.ts`, `gamificationQueue.ts` | Gamification Service | `rez-gamification-service` |
| `routes/merchant/*`, `services/merchant

| Endpoint | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `/health` | Liveness (DB + Redis + payment) |
| `/health/ready` | Readiness probe |
| `/metrics` | Prometheus (admin auth) |
| `/api/auth/*` | Consumer auth (OTP) |
| `/api/merchant/auth/*` | Merchant auth |
| `/api/admin/*` | Admin panel APIs |
| `/api/orders/*` | Order lifecycle |
| `/api/wallet/*` | Wallet ops |
| `/api/cashback/*` | Cashback forecast/claim |
| `/api/qr-checkin/*` | QR check-in |

| Component | Details |
|-----------|---------|
| **Database** | MongoDB (shared single cluster) |
| **Cache/Queue** | Redis + BullMQ (`gamification-events`, notifications) |
| **Payments** | Razorpay |
| **Monitoring** | Sentry (all apps) |
| **CDN/Hosting** | Vercel (web), EAS (native) |
| **Service Auth** | `X-Internal-Token` header |
| **Trace** | `X-Correlation-ID` / `X-Request-ID` via nginx |

| Var | Where | Purpose |
|-----|-------|---------|
| `INTERNAL_SERVICE_TOKEN` | Backend + docker-compose | Service-to-service auth |
| `PUBLIC_URL` | Backend | Invoice/shipping label links |
| `MERCHANT_FRONTEND_URL` | Backend | Merchant email links |
| `MARKETING_SERVICE_URL` | Backend | Marketing service endpoint |
| `EXPO_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN` | All apps | Error tracking |
| `EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL` | Consumer/Merchant/Admin | Backend API URL |
| `EXPO_PUBLIC_RAZORPAY_KEY_ID` | Merchant app |

- [ReZ Consumer App (nuqta-master)](project_rezapp.md) — Core project context: super-app, Expo Router + Zustand + React Context dual-layer, known bugs, 150+ services, 30+ stores

name: ReZ Consumer App (nuqta-master)
description: Core project context — purpose, stack, architecture, known bugs
type: project
---

**What it is:** REZ Consumer super-app (codename "Nuqta") — React Native/Expo lifestyle & commerce platform targeting India/Middle East. Features: shopping, dining, travel (flight/hotel/train/bus/cab), financial tools (wallet, bill payment, recharge, gold savings, insurance, khata), gamification (coin system, scratch cards, minigames), social/UGC content, loyalty/subscription programs, booking/appointments.

**Location:** `/Users/rejaulkarim/Documents/ReZ Full App/rezapp/nuqta-master`
